registry_id.description: DB primary key from the job registry (preferred lookup).

work_dir.description: Absolute path to the job's work directory (fallback if registry_id unknown).

files.description: Filename globs relative to output_dir. e.g. ['d3plot*', 'mes0000']. Default: ['d3plot*'].

destination.description: Where to put the files. 'local' = verify+return paths (no copy). 'rsync' = rsync -av --partial --progress to rsync_target. 'presigned_url' = upload to S3-compatible bucket (sidecar required, NOT deployed yet).

rsync_target.description: Required when destination=rsync. Absolute path on the caller's host or rsync URL like 'user@host:/path'.

max_total_bytes.description: Hard cap on total bytes transferred. Default 50GB. Fails BEFORE transfer if exceeded.
